introSection: Ladybird was a steel roller coaster built by German manufacturer Zierer that was previously located at Dreamland Margate in Margate, Kent, England, UK. The ride opened at the park in March 1982.
fullText:
Ladybird was a steel roller coaster built by German manufacturer Zierer that was previously located at Dreamland Margate in Margate, Kent, England, UK. The ride opened at the park in March 1982.



Red track and white supports.
